chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-3672 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For order on Misc. No. 995/2025 (U/A) 2. For order as to non-prosecution of Misc. No.17183/2024 3. For order as to non-prosecution of Misc. No.17109/2024 4. For order on office objection 5. For hearing of Misc. No. 16897/2023 6. For hearing of main case 27-01-2025. Syed Mehfooz Ali Hashmi, Attorney of the Petitioner present in person Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General 1. Granted. 2-6. Petitioner seeks employment in a Government department on the basis of son quota. The Supreme Court has already declared the same to be unlawful vide judgment dated 26.09.2024 in the case of General Post Office Islamabad vs. Muhammad Jalal (Civil Petition No.3390 of 2021). It has also been reported that Rule 11-A of the Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion & Transfer) Rules, 1974, has already been deleted by the Sindh Cabinet on 04.12.2024. In view of the foregoing this petition is prima facie misconceived, hence, the same is dismissed along with listed application(s). Judge Judge nasir
